title: MPSFRI Notification 2026 - Walk-in interview for 02 Junior Research Fellow Posts
description: The Madhya Pradesh State Forest Research Institute (MPSFRI) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 02 Junior Research Fellow Posts. Interested and eligibile can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their Any Degree, Post-graduation can apply for the MPSFRI Notification 2026. The interested applicants can attend the walk-in interview.
